2020November 2, 2020

Virtual

Resolutions of the plenary meeting of ISO/TC 184/SC 4, Virtual, November 2, 2020 -- November 6, 2020

Meeting URNurn:iso:tc:184:sc:4:meeting:plenary-2020-11-virtual

11 Resolutions

1062Plenary
Circulate CIB for draft JWG 24 procedure for managing standards
SC 4 acknowledges the contribution of the draft procedure and requests its Committee Manager distribute a six-week Committee Internal Ballot for comments in preparation of submitting a Committee Sp...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1060Plenary
Request 9-month extension for ISO 10303-209 ed3 from ISO TMB
SC 4 requests the ISO TMB to grant a nine months extension to ISO 10303-209 edition 3 allowing the project team additional time to complete CD by 15 January 2021, and DIS by 15 July 2021 through ne...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1059Plenary
Move ISO 10303-17 from SDT 24 to SDT 36 development track
SC 4 requests its Committee Manager to apply the 36-month development track to the ISO 10303-17 project.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1058Plenary
Approve ISO/AWI 17506 to move to DIS ballot
SC 4 resolves to promote ISO/AWI 17506 to a DIS ballot and requests the Committee Manager to launch a DIS ballot.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1057Plenary
Initiate review of Liaison appointments through SC 4 Newsletter
SC 4 regularly publishes the current Liaisons through the SC 4 Newsletter twice yearly.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1055Plenary
Extend term of AHG 2 on Nuclear Digital Ecosystem Specification
SC 4 extends the term for AHG 2 to the 81st plenary where a final report will be provided.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1054Plenary
Extend term of AHG 1 on Core Industrial Data Set of Terms
SC 4 extends the term of the AHG 1 and requests its final report at the 81st Plenary meeting of SC 4. AHG 1 is requested to provide a plan for the further work itemized in the introduction to this ...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1053Plenary
Appoint Tim King as liaison representative to ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 7
Additional liaison representative from SC 4 to ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 7 (Software and systems engineering)
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
1052Plenary
Appoint Hayley Thompson as WG 23 Deputy Convenor
SC 4 appoints Hayley Thompson as the Deputy Convenor for WG 23 for a three-year term, with appreciation for her offer to serve in that capacity.
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its appreciation to our SC 4 Liaisons and reports provided to the 80th Plenary: * ISO/TC 171/SC 2 (Written) * IEC/SC 3D * ISO/IEC JTC 1/SC 24 and Web 3D Consortium
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
Acclamation
Acclamation
SC 4 expresses its sincere appreciation to all the experts, delegates, and leaders for executing a completely virtual plenary meeting successfully while undergoing numerous challenges during this e...
ISO/TC 184/SC 4 "Industrial data"
ISO/TC 184/SC 4

Industrial data

Standardization of the content, meaning, structure, representation and quality management of information for engineered products throughout their lifecycle.

Committee

  • Secretariat: ANSI (Secretariat)
  • Chair: Kenneth Swope
  • Established: 1984
  • Standards: 822 published
  • Members: 21 (P), 14 (O)
